vocabulary.example_sentence: It is easy to make friends when you greet people kindly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 友好地打招呼时很容易交到朋友。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We get to know each other on the first day of school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在开学第一天互相认识了解。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please write your full name on the form.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请在表格上写下你的全名。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My full name is Zhang Wei, but you can call me Wei.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的全名是张伟，但你可以叫我伟。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I am in Grade 7 this year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我今年上七年级。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Brown is his last name.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: Brown 是他的姓。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My classmate Emma sits in front of me.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的同班同学埃玛坐在我前面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our class teacher helps us get to know the school rules.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的班主任帮助我们了解校规。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My first name is Tom, and my last name is Smith.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的名字是 Tom，姓是 Smith。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Everyone makes a mistake when they learn a new language.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每个人学新语言时都会犯错。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Australia is a beautiful country with many unique animals.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 澳大利亚是一个有许多独特动物的美丽国家。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We are in the same class and share the same hobby.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在同一个班，有相同的爱好。

vocabulary.chinese: 双胞胎之一；双胞胎之一的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Lisa and Sally are twin sisters in our grade.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 莉萨和萨莉是我们年级的一对双胞胎姐妹。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Both Tom and I play tennis after school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆和我放学后都打网球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Pauline plays the guitar in the school band.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 保利娜在学校乐队里弹吉他。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We put hot pot in a big pot on the table.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们把火锅放在桌上的大锅里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I like Beijing roast duck a lot.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我非常喜欢北京烤鸭。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mapo tofu is a famous dish from China.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 麻婆豆腐是一道来自中国的名菜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Coco has a colourful parrot that can say hello.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 科科有一只会说“你好”的彩色鹦鹉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Would you like to play the guitar with me?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你愿意和我一起弹吉他吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tom plays tennis in the park every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆每天都在公园打网球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please turn to page twenty-four in your book.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请把书翻到第二十四页。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She can play chess and even Chinese chess.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她会下国际象棋，甚至会下中国象棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Hey, would you like some information about our hobby club?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 嘿，你想了解一下我们兴趣小组的信息吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Pauline loves to play the guitar after class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 保利娜下课后喜欢弹吉他。

vocabulary.chinese: 想（用于礼貌地邀请或向某人提供某物）；将会
vocabulary.example_sentence: Would you like to tell me about your country?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你愿意跟我讲讲你的国家吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: I would like to make friends with students from the UK.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我想和来自英国的学生交朋友。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please write your hobby information on this page.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请在这一页写下你的爱好信息。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My hobby is tennis, and my twin brother likes chess.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的爱好是网球，我的双胞胎哥哥喜欢下棋。

vocabulary.chinese: （用于回复电子邮件）关于；事由
vocabulary.example_sentence: Re: hobby club — thanks for your information.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 回复：兴趣小组——谢谢你的信息。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mr Green is our class teacher from the UK.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 格林先生是来自英国的我们的班主任。

vocabulary.example_sentence: London is the capital of the UK.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 伦敦是英国的首都。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My pen pal lives in the US.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的笔友住在美国。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tom Smith is a new student in our class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆·史密斯是我们班的新同学。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lisa and I have the same hobby.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 莉萨和我有相同的爱好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tom would like to play ping-pong with us.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆想和我们一起打乒乓球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We eat hot pot with tofu and vegetables.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们吃火锅时配豆腐和蔬菜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sally is from Sydney, Australia.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 萨莉来自澳大利亚悉尼。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mr Wood teaches us English this year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 伍德先生今年教我们英语。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sydney is a big city in Australia.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 悉尼是澳大利亚的一座城市。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Australia is Sally's country.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 澳大利亚是萨莉的祖国。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mapo tofu tastes spicy and delicious.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 麻婆豆腐又辣又好吃。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Beijing roast duck is famous around the world.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 北京烤鸭闻名世界。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lee moved to Singapore last year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 李去年搬到了新加坡。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We visited the Great Wall during the holiday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 假期里我们参观了长城。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Pauline plays the guitar in the school band.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 保利娜在学校乐队里弹吉他。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lee and Coco are good friends.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 李和科科是好朋友。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Coco keeps a parrot at home.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 科科在家养了一只鹦鹉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: London is a city in the UK.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 伦敦是英国的一座城市。
